intro: Camptocarpus orientalis, also known as the 'Iron Tree', is a succulent plant species native to the Arabian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. The bioactive constituents of Camptocarpus orientalis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Camptocarpus orientalis is often used to prepare infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and digestive issues.
